metaData.Key Information:
• Advanced Japan R&D formula ensures thorough cleaning
• Eliminates dirt and stains for a complete wash
• It removes tough stains by penetrating quickly into fabric fibres even on areas like collars and cuffs
• Contains advanced anti-bacteria formula that inhibits bacteria growth and preventing odor (such as musty from indoor drying and sweat odors) from wash to wear
metaData.Preparation:
• Top Load:
1. 1/2 cap = 30L (10 pieces - 15 pieces)
2. 1 cap = 50L (16 pieces - 20 pieces)
3. 1 and 1/2 cap = 70L (21 pieces - 25 pieces)
• Front Load:
1/2 cap (16 pieces - 20 pieces)
• Hand Wash:
1/2 cap = 8L (5 pieces - 10 pieces)
• Noodles:
Apply detergent directly on stubborn stains
Suitable for all washable cotton, linens, aritficial skills and synthenic fibres
• Caution:
Do not drink and if swallowed, take plenty of water and consult physician
2. Avoid contact eyes and if into contact, flush with water and consult physician
3. Wear rubber gloves when hand washing
4. If the detergent is spilled on the washing machine, wipe off with damp or wet cloth

metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Pour 1 cap to wash 15 - 20 clothes
2. Apply directly and rub detergent to pre-treat tougher stains
3. Pour the rest of detergent into washing machine
• Caution:
1. Wash and dry hands after each wash
2. For sensitive skin, do not touch detergent for prolonged duration
3. If in contact with eyes, rinse with water for several minutes
4. If consumed, drink water and seek medical attention immediately
• Others:
For best results, wash stained clothes immediately

metaData.Key Information:
• Advanced anti-bacterial formula that inhibits bacteria growth, eliminating unpleasant odour
• Penetrates deeply into fabric fibres even on areas like collars and cuffs to get rid of stubborn stains
• Innovatively formulated with softener to keep your clothes clean, soft and smooth
• Contains fibre smoothing essence which reduces wrinkles on clothes after drying to facilitate easy ironing
• Leaves a refreshing floral fragrance on clothes that lasts from wash, dry to wear
